flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 31% at Columbia College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.4k vs 7.8k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Columbia College fell 20% between 2021 and 2024 (6.2k → 5.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Columbia College rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.4k → $14.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Columbia College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
